sentence: 附近有一座历史悠久的清真寺。
pinyin: Fùjìn yǒu yī zuò lìshǐ yōujiǔ de qīngzhēnsì.
english: There is a mosque with a long history nearby.

meaning: 1. to ride as a passenger; 2. to travel by (car, plane etc)
english: I take the subway to work.

sentence: 他们两个总是甜蜜地牵着手走路。
pinyin: Tāmen liǎng gè zǒng shì tiánmì de qiān zhe shǒu zǒulù.
english: The two of them always walk hand in hand so sweetly.

meaning: 1. competition of skill (e.g. sports); 2. athletics tournament
sentence: 他从小就热爱竞技体育。
pinyin: Tā cóng xiǎo jiù rè'ài jìngjì tǐyù.
english: He has loved competitive athletics since he was a child.

sentence: 他的梦想是成为一名外交官。
pinyin: Tā de mèng xiǎng shì chéng wéi yī míng wài jiāo guān.
english: His dream is to become a diplomat.
